raw_text: Blinkit service is good overall. Delivery is usually fast and items are fresh and well packed. However, sometimes there are small issues like delivery boys arriving late or not delivering the सामान upstairs. They should also hire more educated staff who can properly read the address and understand where to deliver. Apart from these issues, the overall experience is good.

This was a really disappointing experience. My order is showing as delivered on the app, but I never received the item. I already reported the issue, yet the refund is taking an unreasonable amount of time.

This is a very useful app. I can even find things here that are not available in nearby markets. My experience has been very good. The items that I cannot easily find elsewhere are easily available here. The packaging is excellent, and the delivery staff are very cooperative. They contact me directly at my location and deliver the order without causing any inconvenience. Overall, I have had a very good experience.

when i order for someone else at some other location, everytime the delivery partner calls me who placed the order even though I give other persons contact in the app, it is frustrating experience to be honest!!

when I was finding this it was not available but there was option of notyfing the moment I turned on it within 10 to 15 minutes I was notified me that what you were looking for it is available then I taped on it and instantly ordered it very helpful option and I would like to say one more thing I checked it on zepto big basket but they could not help me 😊keep your costomer happy like me

Blinkit Fee Menu (what they don't show you upfront): 🧾 Platform fee — for existing 🛒 Small cart fee — for not spending enough 🌧️ Rain fee — for weather 📈 High demand fee — for being popular 🚴 Delivery fee — the one fee that actually makes sense I understand logistics cost money — but charging customers separately for rain, demand, and platform usage on top of delivery is just nickel-and-diming. These should be built into your pricing model, not slapped on at the last second.

At first whenever I ordered from blinkit, it was delivered within given time, it was good. But now when I open blinkit to order it shows Currently Unavailable, this happened 5 to 6 times, very bad experience.

there is should policy with electronic products even replacements should be taken seriously, I bought a product of agaro brand and the battery was detirotraing fastly even though it was charged initially. i charged it again the same thing.but when asked for replacement so that I can get new brand packed ones they said no replacement because the product was one piece left I am sure. they said to contact brand if someone is contacting the brand then why are guys selling on your premises
horrible aap experience... the location aap tracking is worst. Order always get delayed from 12 minutes to 30 minutes. The UI always get stuck. This is very disappointing. Never using this app again

I recently placed an order with Blinkit and received the wrong package. I immediately informed the delivery guy, and he assured me it would be easily replaced or refunded. Even after two days of trying to reach their customer care service, all I received were repetitive excuses claiming they had “verified w/ the delivery partner” and that they couldn’t help because the order was “properly packed.” Extremely disappointing service and zero accountability. Refusing to help afterward is unacceptable

I would really like to thank Blinkit from the bottom of my heart for their Blinkit ambulance feature. It is extremely useful and the most convenient option in medical emergency situations. Thank you very much for coming up with such a thoughtful feature.

If you have any items missing or damaged, then forget about getting a replacement or refund..The customer support will just waste your time and ask you to come back tomorrow and keep doing this till the complaint window closes..They will just harass and make it impossible to get a resolution..We should stop buying from these platforms so that they run out of business..!!

The experience is great, and the delivery has always been on time. However, the problem is that it works for some areas at my place, but if I place an order from 200-300 m away, it indicates an unserviceable location for the same road and location.

I had a very bad experience today I ordered gits of gulab jamun, rasgulla and idli but they were delivered already prepared and also 10 Pieces of gulab jamun and rasagulla....even I returned all items but they mentioned only one item as a refund and rest item I don't know what happened with that..i lost my product and money both..... never order anything from blinkit

COD was available on my account earlier, but since yesterday it shows "This payment method is not available at the moment." Support chat keeps looping and does not provide a way to contact an agent. Very frustrating experience.

“Very disappointing experience with Blinkit. I returned an item and received a promo code as compensation, but whenever I try to use it, the payment goes into ‘pending payment review’ and then fails. I tried multiple times and still faced the same issue. The promo code feels completely useless and misleading. On top of that, there is no proper customer care support to resolve the issue. Really frustrating experience.”

Received the order in very poor condition. The package and product were completely covered in dust and looked unhygienic and badly handled during delivery. This is not the quality I expected. The item does not feel fresh or properly packed. Very disappointed with the overall experience. Please look into this issue seriously and provide a proper resolution or replacement as soon as possible.

the grocery product are good in blink it but the electronic section i have returned more than 3 products they are the worst service giver out there. absolute trash customer support. dont recommend it for electronic product at all.

This app sucks. It shows delivery time of 25 minutes and deliver the package in 50 minutes. If Blinkit can't deliver in time they should stop fooling customer. It's not the first they have did it many times with me.

This was my first order on Blinkit, and it turned out to be a terrible experience. The flower bouquet I received looked used and was defective—full of dust and even strands of hair. Completely unacceptable quality and very disappointing service. Definitely not what I expected. Truly a “blink and regret” moment.
